non_blocking_findings: The Issue 162 historical checkpoint ledger remains an early structural record; the accepted processed evidence and final report continue to control.
The route-oracle-v0.3-default string is a retained Route Oracle 0.4 threshold-profile identifier, not a Route Oracle 0.3 executable or result identity.
Individual route, freshness, successor, linearization, tracing, and clock components exist and retain matching hashes, but no frozen V0-P integration path binds them.
The locked dependency source commits resolve locally; the required ROS Jazzy setup does not.
blocker_summary: No unique V0-P qualification runner, scenario mapping, or exact qualification seed-selection entry exists.
No qualification-only registration, compact-evidence, cleanup-audit, residual-process, or occupied-port checker is integrated.
The existing pre-M-FINAL fuzzer executor uses the old seed manifest and Route Oracle 0.3 result identity and is inadmissible for this protocol.
The frozen ROS Jazzy environment is unavailable while the legacy P5 execution path is wired to ROS Humble.
required_independent_action: Create an independent readiness-resolution plan that implements and statically qualifies a V0-P-only runner, scenario mapping, evidence and cleanup integration, and the exact locked ROS Jazzy environment without changing the frozen research design.
next_exact_action: create an independent amendment or readiness-resolution plan for the recorded blockers
